title: The Official Star Wars Fact File 61
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 61}} {{ReferenceMagazine |image=[[File:Fact_file_61.jpg]] |title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 61 |editor=[[Christopher Cerasi]] |contributors=*[[Rich Handley]] *[[Liz Holliday]] *[[Andy Lane]] *[[Iain Lowson]] *[[James McFadden]] *[[Michael Schiavetta]] *[[Jim Swallow]] |publisher=[[De Agostini]] |release date=[[February 26]], [[2003]]{{FFdates|61}} |intl release= |pages= |issue=61 |featured= |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' }} '''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 61''' was the sixty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 26]], [[2003]]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== *[[Dagobah/Legends|Return to Dagobah]]
How [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] kept his promise to [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] to finish his training *[[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Supreme Chancellor Palpatine]] *[[Zuckuss/Legends|Bounty Hunters - Zuckuss]] *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant - The Dark Underbelly]] *[[Courier droid/Legends|Messenger Droids]]
{{C|[[Seeker AS-M12 message droid|AS-M12 Seeker]]) & ([[Elegance message drone|'Elegance' Message Droid]]}} *[[Gaderffii/Legends|Tusken Weaponry]] *[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] *[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Control Ship]] ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Official Star Wars Fact File 61}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= *[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] *[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *[[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]] {{Imo}} *[[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] *[[Borsk Fey'lya]] *[[Xarcce Huwla]] {{C|Starfighter only}} *[[Verrinnefra B'thog Indriummsegh]] {{Imo}} *[[Kerrithrarr/Legends|Kerrithrarr]] {{Imo}} *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[Jenssar SoBilles]] {{Imo}} *[[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]] {{Imo}} |organisms= |droids= |events= *[[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]] |locations= *[[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] **[[Brentaal system/Legends|Brentaal system]] {{Po}} ***[[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] |organizations= *[[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] *[[Baron of the Empire/Legends|Baron of the Empire]] *[[New Republic Provisional Council]] *[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{FactFileNav|60|62}} {{Interlang |fi=The Official Star Wars Fact File 61 |ka=The Official Star Wars Fact File 61 }} [[Category:The Official Star Wars Fact File (2002) issues|61]]
